basic_details.job_title: CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) Special Public Prosecutor Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website CBI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: LLB degree. Enrolment Certificate as an Advocate with the Bar Council. Minimum 10 years standing as an Advocate with experience in handling criminal matters.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CBI to complete the application.
